name: Jellyfin Diagnostics
description: Admin diagnostics plugin for detecting common Docker/Unraid configuration issues in Jellyfin 10.11.x.
overview: Analyzes Jellyfin server configuration and environment to detect hardware acceleration, volume mapping, permission, and networking issues. Optionally forwards sanitized reports to any OpenAI-compatible AI endpoint for analysis.

versions.changelog: Fixes the Diagnostics menu entry rendering as a blank screen. The dashboard HTML was missing the required data-role=page wrapper that Jellyfins plugin page loader expects. Also switches to ApiClient.ajax for proper auth and base URL handling.

Fixes plugin not appearing in Jellyfin catalog after adding the repository. Empty imageUrl field in the manifest was causing silent rejection. Also fixes meta.json inside the installed zip to match the tag version.

Adds a proper Settings page with form fields for AI integration toggle, endpoint URL, API key, and log lines to scan. Clicking Settings next to the plugin in Dashboard -> Plugins now shows a working configuration form. The separate Diagnostics entry in the admin side menu continues to serve the dashboard view for running scans.
